narrative:
Washington Twp (precinct in Paulding County) has 426 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.2 percentage points.
